metrics.name: Median resolution time
metrics.definition: Median elapsed hours from support case creation to resolved state for eligible aggregate support cases.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Open backlog count
metrics.definition: Count of eligible unresolved support cases remaining open at the end of the approved measurement window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period backlog count for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period backlog directionally with volume and staffing caveats attached.

metrics.name: Escalation rate
metrics.definition: Share of eligible support cases escalated from first-line support to advanced support.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period escalation rate.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period escalation share directionally with caveats.

metrics.name: Reopen rate
metrics.definition: Share of eligible resolved support cases reopened within the approved measurement window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period reopen rate.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period reopen share directionally with caveats.

metrics.name: First contact resolution rate
metrics.definition: Share of eligible support cases resolved during the first support interaction without escalation or reopen.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period first contact resolution rate.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period rate directionally; do not attribute change to AI without separate validation.

metrics.name: Customer satisfaction score
metrics.definition: Aggregate customer satisfaction score for eligible support interactions in the approved measurement window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period aggregate CSAT score.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period score directionally with response-rate and sample caveats.

metrics.name: Verification coverage
metrics.definition: Share of aggregate AI-assisted support episodes with verification or corroboration behavior attached.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period or reference-window aggregate verification coverage rate.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare post-period verification coverage directionally; use as trust context, not outcome proof.
